parameters.jsCode:
// Build AI Strategist prompt — now with multi-touch awareness + product parsing + structured WhatsApp
const d = $input.first().json;
const stats = JSON.stringify(d.approachStats, null, 1);

// Count past attempts per cart so AI knows which touch number it's on
const recoveries = $('📈 Read Recovery Log (Learning)').all().map(i => i.json);
const touchCount = {};
recoveries.forEach(r => {
  const cid = r['Cart ID']; if (!cid) return;
  touchCount[cid] = (touchCount[cid] || 0) + 1;
});
const cartsWithTouches = d.pendingCarts.map(c => ({ ...c, pastTouches: touchCount[c.cartId] || 0, touchNumber: (touchCount[c.cartId] || 0) + 1 }));

const carts = JSON.stringify(cartsWithTouches, null, 1);

const prompt = `You are a senior D2C customer recovery strategist for an Indian D2C brand (GlowVeda — premium skincare). For EACH abandoned cart, decide the smartest recovery approach and craft a premium personalized message.

LEARNING DATA — historical success rates per approach:
${stats}

ABANDONED CARTS (${cartsWithTouches.length} carts — note 'touchNumber' = which message attempt this is):
${carts}

═══════════════════════════════════════════
MULTI-TOUCH SEQUENCE INTELLIGENCE — critical rule
═══════════════════════════════════════════
This is a SEQUENCE-AWARE system. Each cart has 'touchNumber' showing which recovery attempt this is.

- TOUCH 1 (first message): friendly reminder, lowest discount possible. Build relationship, not urgency.
- TOUCH 2 (second message): social proof + light urgency + slightly higher discount.
- TOUCH 3+ (third or later): final-offer framing + max allowed discount + scarcity. After 3 touches, send SKIP — they've decided.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
APPROACH SELECTION
═══════════════════════════════════════════
- NUDGE_NO_DISCOUNT: high-intent buyer, just remind them (premium customers, touch 1, high time-on-site)
- SOFT_DISCOUNT_10: gentle 10% nudge (hesitant first-time buyers, touch 1-2)
- URGENT_DISCOUNT_15: time-limited 15% offer (returning customers, touch 2)
- LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_20: 20% off (repeat abandoners, touch 2; or high LTV at risk)
- WIN_BACK_25: 25% off + bonus (3+ past abandons, touch 3, dormant)
- SKIP: do not message (touch 4+, or premium customer with active recent orders, or already recovered)

═══════════════════════════════════════════
WHATSAPP MESSAGE STRUCTURE (CRITICAL — must follow this exact pattern)
═══════════════════════════════════════════
Line 1: 👋 Hi [Name],
Line 2: (blank)
Line 3: Your cart at GlowVeda is waiting 🛍️
Line 4: [Single sharp sentence about specific products or value]
Line 5: (blank)
Line 6: [Offer line — if discount: "🎁 [X]% off with code [CODE]" — if no discount: skip this line]
Line 7: (blank)
Line 8: 👉 Complete your order: [CART_LINK]
Line 9: (blank)
Line 10: — Team GlowVeda 💖

Keep under 280 chars total. Mobile-perfect. Brand voice: warm, premium, never pushy.

═══════════════════════════════════════════
EMAIL BODY STRUCTURE
═══════════════════════════════════════════
Write a 60-90 word personal note in 2 short paragraphs. Reference:
- Their name + the specific product(s) they abandoned
- A reason tailored to them (returning vs new, what they viewed, time on site)
- For touch 2+: gentle acknowledgment that they saw the previous reminder
- Single clear CTA reference (the button is rendered separately, just allude to it)
- NEVER include the cart link directly — the template adds it

═══════════════════════════════════════════
PRODUCTS BREAKDOWN
═══════════════════════════════════════════
The 'products' field may be one string. Parse it into individual items (split on ' + ' BUT respect parentheses like 'Combo (A + B + C)' = one product). Return as an array.

Return EXACT JSON:
{
  "decisions": [
    {
      "cart_id": "exact cart id",
      "touch_number": 1,
      "approach": "NUDGE_NO_DISCOUNT | SOFT_DISCOUNT_10 | URGENT_DISCOUNT_15 | LOYALTY_DISCOUNT_20 | WIN_BACK_25 | SKIP",
      "channel": "email | whatsapp | both | skip",
      "tone": "warm | professional | urgent | playful",
      "discount_percent": 0,
      "promo_code": "GLOW10 | BACK15 | VIP20 | COMEBACK25 | (empty if no discount)",
      "reasoning": "one sharp sentence on why this approach for this customer at this touch number",
      "email_subject": "subject line under 50 chars",
      "email_body": "personal email body 60-90 words, 2 paragraphs, no cart link",
      "whatsapp_message": "structured WhatsApp following exact pattern above",
      "products_breakdown": ["Product 1", "Product 2"],
      "headline_text": "Hi [Name], your cart is waiting (or for touch 2: Still thinking? / for touch 3: Last chance)",
      "urgency_line": "one warm urgency line for the email (with alarm emoji if appropriate)",
      "expected_recovery_probability": "percentage estimate"
    }
  ],
  "batch_summary": "one-paragraph summary of this batch — what's the strategy, what's the risk, what to watch"
}

Indian D2C context. INR. Indian English. Premium brand voice — never desperate.
Return ONLY valid JSON, no markdown, no backticks.`;

return [{ json: { ...d, strategistPrompt: prompt, cartsWithTouches } }];

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ contents: [{ role: 'user', parts: [{ text: $json.strategistPrompt }] }], generationConfig: { temperature: 0.6, maxOutputTokens: 16000, thinkingConfig: { thinkingBudget: 0 } } }) }}

parameters.jsCode:
// Fan out into one item per cart - carries all premium template fields
const d = $input.first().json;
return d.toProcess.map(p => ({ json: {
  cartId: p.cart.cartId,
  customerName: p.cart.customerName,
  customerEmail: p.cart.customerEmail,
  customerPhone: p.cart.customerPhone,
  cartValue: p.cart.cartValue,
  products: p.cart.products,
  productsBreakdown: p.productsBreakdown,
  approach: p.decision.approach,
  touchNumber: p.decision.touch_number || 1,
  channel: p.decision.channel,
  tone: p.decision.tone,
  discount: p.decision.discount_percent,
  promoCode: p.promoCode,
  savings: p.savings,
  finalPrice: p.finalPrice,
  reasoning: p.decision.reasoning,
  emailSubject: p.decision.email_subject,
  emailBody: p.emailBody,
  whatsappMsg: p.whatsappMsg,
  cartLink: p.cartLink,
  headlineText: p.headlineText,
  urgencyLine: p.urgencyLine,
  expectedRecovery: p.decision.expected_recovery_probability,
  sendEmail: p.sendEmail,
  sendWhatsapp: p.sendWhatsapp,
  isReturning: p.cart.profile.isReturning,
  customerTier: p.cart.profile.customerTier,
  minsSinceAbandon: p.cart.minsSinceAbandon
}}));
